policy.current_main_tracked_source: Treat as canonical only when the current relpath exists and is tracked by git on main. The historical pyc recovery record remains custody evidence, not source.
policy.explicit_noncurrent_first_party: Require a tracked replacement path and evidence string in this manifest.
policy.private_forensic_provider_state: Provider-state mirrors are not public source and are retained only in local custody/state snapshots.
policy.private_forensic_public_or_experiment_in: Public leaderboard/intake runtime residues are not repo source. Preserve archives and intake ledgers; do not rehydrate incomplete pyc decompilation into main.
